_notes: Single source of truth for season-specific facts. Scripts load this
instead of hardcoding slot maps. When Sleeper posts the REAL 2026
draft order, update slot_to_roster_id and set order_is_confirmed=true.
When keepers lock, write data/keepers_2026_actual.json (same format as
keepers_2026.json) - the pipeline will prefer it over the prediction.
